recommendations.reasoning: 2nd and 7 is a manageable distance. Inside zone keeps the defense honest and sets up play action on 3rd down if we pick up 3-4 yards.
Quick slant gets us the first down if the slot beats the nickel. Low risk, high reward on 2nd and 7.
We've been running well this drive. Play action could catch the linebackers cheating up. Risk is the longer development time.

dc_intel.adjustment: Watch for safety cheating down — deep post could be open
